item.title: I stole this dump, so you don't have to. Tuesday random meme dump
item.description:
1. Always a joy when this clip comes up
2. Joker asking the real questions
3. Straight women problems
4. How to walk in order to avoid the Shai-Hulud
5. A YouTuber learns about a major historical event for the first time
6. This mom packs launch lick it's cocaine
7. Crazy that, init?
8
9
10. On that note I like the Last of Us HBO show, but in my opinion the game just does it better and gives better understanding of the relationship between Joel and Ellie. I really do not care about the some of the new characters like Katleen or whatever her name was. Also the lack of infected is kind of a bad choice. Still, very interested what they will do with Season 2 and 3 which will cover Part II.
11. Like what?
12
13. Man intervenes in street cat standoff
14. Excuse me miss, but your smockin' hot Joking aside, great reaction from the guy, saved the day.
15. How I feel when someone appreciates my work... Along with posting on Imgur in my spare time (which is like 5-6 hours per night) I work on my passion project which is a wacky "Stanley Parable"-inspired game. If you are a fan and this dump entertained you, chances are that you might like my game too. Please wishlist on Steam, it's a great way to support us, small dev teams: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Who put all this nostalgia on the bottom shelf?
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the meme challenges! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Love Axes Hate
item.description:
This small business in Ellicott City, MD was getting grief from intolerant a-holes over hosting a drag event and people across the country more than made up for the followers he lost! Front Page Edit: Please send love to people in your area! And here is the link I forgot to add initially to the show: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/drag-me-to-the-axegard-tickets-586094593707
(originally posted by @timichanga on 2023-03-26 21:32:04)

item.title: Terrified and excited
item.description: She is coming soon! Jumping between happy and terrified. I hope I’m a good parent. Edit 1: Thank you everyone for the kind words. Still in the early stages and home now. Doctor says it could be hours or a few days. Still freaking out. Contractions are fun tho.

item.title: My Seveteenth Dump
item.description:
Today you have been baited into looking at silly images on the internet with a picture of... whoof, this hot-ass doom marine. Yeah, don't say I never do nothin' for ya!
You know that "I don't have a type" gif? Yeah...
It is kind of funny the same Irish unification meme is currently being used what with CKing Chuck being ill and all. And Kate having gone missing. Which... I guess isn't THAT funny anymore.
... I mean, that whole photoshop fiasco is still pretty funny.
979 images left in the folder now for the Meme Teme Macheme to go through!
... I guess it does become less and less particularly memorable as we come closer to the present day.
ANYWAY LET'S GOOOOO!!!
But like... a cute sewer rat though. Make all the boy sewer rats go "chik-chikky-boom, chik-chikky-boom."
Honestly, I suck at beer pong. I suck real bad. But I am also lucky. Which is good when you're drunk.
This meme from a slightly different time when Ukraine was making a little more progress on the battlefield. Can't wait for those F-16's to take back the skies.
I ducking love Barry! Have you seen Barry? You should see Barry. Barry is so good.
I guess we have reached September of 2022! So not REALLY present day yet!
Meme Teme Macheme gooooo!
It's The New Mutants. I bet you'd even forgotten that existed.
Frogs!
Phröööögs!
God damn. NFS Underground 2 tho...
Oh shit it another frog!
This meme brought to you by the Italian election of 2022.
I feel like it's sometimes a bit obvious but we also really do love just a little robot guy.
My brother is a big Sabaton fan. I imagine I originally sent this to him.
See y'all tomorrow!
item.dc:creator: Kateness

item.title: Man attacks a woman in public and gets what he deserves
item.dc:creator: ABCDEmxinh99

item.title: One
item.description: She was a Feminine icon, beginning a movement to end the unjust policing of how bodies are viewed publicly. Some modern writers have recently claimed Agnès as a feminist, a model more appropriate to post-WWII France. Her biographer Robert Philippe tells the life story of Agnes Sorel, who became the first officially designated French royal mistress in 1444. During his reign, forty-year-old king Charles VII selected the extraordinarily beautiful, twenty-two-year-old Agnes as his mistress, which led to him defining a new role for women in the courts and a new practice for French kings. Being presented to Charles VII's court gave Agnes a quasi-official status, not to mention bringing her into greater prominence than earlier mistresses. Unintentionally, Charles VII's designation of Agnes as royal mistress had long-term ramifications, specifically for the roles of the king and queen, and for their relationship. The position also offered new ways for a king's contemporaries and subsequent historians to assess his reign.
item.dc:creator: AliceWins

item.title: The first AT-ST is being designed for the Empire!
item.description: LimX Dynamics P1 is a versatile bipedal robot equipped with reinforcement learning capabilities, enabling it to master challenging terrains such as forests and ditches while maintaining its balance.
